omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We work with third-party advertising partners to show you ads that we think may interest you. These partners may collect information about your activity on the BlaBlaCar Platform and on other websites and apps to predict your interests and to select and display ads for you. This may include the use of cookies and similar technologies to collect information about your device, such as your device’s advertising ID, IP address, and information about your browser or operating system.

3.3. We also work with third parties, who may be recipients of your Personal Data, such as: our business partners who are social media platforms and with whom we may share some of your Data, for example to create and broadcast targeted advertising campaigns on their platforms; our business partners who can advertise their services on our platforms and to whom you can decide to subscribe. These can be in particular insurance, banking, car rental partners. When you decide to subscribe to their services, you authorise us to provide them with your Personal Data necessary for the conclusion of your contract with them; our subcontractors (in particular technical, commercial and payment services, identity verification or providers of analytical solutions).
